description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named docs that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: build and publish. The build job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, installs Hatch, checks and builds documentation, and uploads it as an artifact. The publish job, which runs only on push to master and depends on build, downloads the artifact, and deploys it to GitHub Pages using the gh-pages action.
